name: Agent Trust Gate

LocalCliInput.description: No tool input. Execute the documented local CLI flag from the repository.

tools.name: atg_health
tools.description: Check local gateway health and whether optional local API-key mode is enabled.
tools.output_summary: Health, service, request, client, and API-key-mode fields.
tools.safety_note: Reads local gateway metadata or usage records only. Agent Trust Gate returns trust decisions and evidence only and never executes actions.

tools.name: atg_decide
tools.description: Evaluate a stable action descriptor before a caller takes a high-impact action.
tools.output_summary: ALLOW, BLOCK, or human-approval-required trust decision with risk and usage fields.
tools.safety_note: Returns a local trust decision only. The tool never executes the described action.

tools.name: atg_create_approval_pack
tools.description: Create a local approval packet from an action trust decision.
tools.output_summary: Approval packet and optional explicit local save status.
tools.safety_note: Returns or saves local evidence only when explicitly requested. The tool never executes actions.

tools.name: atg_create_evidence_bundle
tools.description: Create a portable local evidence bundle from a human review record.
tools.output_summary: Evidence bundle and optional explicit local save status.
tools.safety_note: Returns or saves local evidence only when explicitly requested. The tool never executes actions.

tools.name: atg_get_openapi
tools.description: Retrieve the machine-readable local gateway API contract.
tools.output_summary: OpenAPI 3.1 document for the local gateway.
tools.safety_note: Reads local gateway metadata or usage records only. Agent Trust Gate returns trust decisions and evidence only and never executes actions.

tools.name: atg_get_entitlement
tools.description: Read local client identity, allowance, remaining usage, and upgrade-required signals.
tools.output_summary: Local entitlement status and disabled purchase, automatic-purchase, and billing signals.
tools.safety_note: Returns a local entitlement control signal only. It never purchases, bills, processes payments, or executes actions.

tools.name: atg_get_commercial_readiness
tools.description: Read an honest local planning snapshot for local, commercial MVP, and full-target readiness.
tools.output_summary: Readiness percentages, category evidence and gaps, missing capabilities, and next steps.
tools.safety_note: Returns local planning metadata only. It never bills, processes payments, enables automatic purchase, or executes actions.

tools.name: atg_get_hosted_readiness
tools.description: Read local pre-hosting checks, blockers, environment guidance, and required gates.
tools.output_summary: Hosted preparation percentage, checks, blockers, required controls, and safe local defaults.
tools.safety_note: Preparation only. It does not deploy Agent Trust Gate, bind publicly, or expose a service.

tools.name: atg_get_security_readiness
tools.description: Read local production security preparation checks, critical gaps, and required controls.
tools.output_summary: Security preparation percentage, checks, critical gaps, hosting requirements, and recommended controls.
tools.safety_note: Planning snapshot only. It does not certify production security, deploy Agent Trust Gate, or expose a public service.

tools.name: atg_get_usage
tools.description: Read the local gateway usage and allowance summary through the CLI.
tools.output_summary: Gateway usage totals, client counts, limits, and errors from local logs.
tools.safety_note: Reads local gateway metadata or usage records only. Agent Trust Gate returns trust decisions and evidence only and never executes actions.

tools.name: atg_get_admin_summary
tools.description: Read the local operator summary through the CLI.
tools.output_summary: Local gateway health, decision activity, authentication, limits, and client summaries.
tools.safety_note: Reads local gateway metadata or usage records only. Agent Trust Gate returns trust decisions and evidence only and never executes actions.

usage_model.local_only_note: Usage and allowance fields are local control records only. They do not bill customers or process payments.

safety_statement: Agent Trust Gate returns local trust decisions and evidence objects only. It does not execute actions, bill customers, process payments, expose a public service, authenticate real-world identities, guarantee legality, or prove compliance.
